data.title: Contract: REPLAN_TRIGGER/REPLAN_RESOLVED observability signal format
data.description:
## Description
Create the contract document defining the REPLAN_TRIGGER and REPLAN_RESOLVED structured comment formats used by the sprint self-healing loop for observability.

## Implementation
Create plugins/dso/docs/contracts/replan-observability.md with:
- Signal Name: REPLAN_TRIGGER / REPLAN_RESOLVED
- Location: Epic ticket comments (via .claude/scripts/dso ticket comment)
- REPLAN_TRIGGER format: "REPLAN_TRIGGER: <type> — <description>"
  - Valid types: drift, failure, validation, review
  - Written BEFORE the re-planning action
- REPLAN_RESOLVED format: "REPLAN_RESOLVED: <tier> — <description>"
  - Valid tiers: implementation-plan, brainstorm
  - Written AFTER successful re-planning
- Non-interactive mode: when brainstorm escalation is needed in non-interactive mode, record "INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED: brainstorm — <reason>" instead of blocking for user confirmation
- Example payloads for each type

## test-exempt: no conditional logic
Documentation-only contract artifact with no executable behavior.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Contract file exists
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/docs/contracts/replan-observability.md
- [ ] Contract defines all 4 trigger types
  Verify: grep -c 'drift\|failure\|validation\|review' plugins/dso/docs/contracts/replan-observability.md | awk '{exit ($1 < 4)}'
- [ ] Contract defines INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED handling
  Verify: grep -q 'INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED' plugins/dso/docs/contracts/replan-observability.md
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
